nasb.text: then hear from heaven, from Your dwelling place, their prayer and supplications, and maintain their cause and forgive Your people who have sinned against You.

esv.text: then hear from heaven your dwelling place their prayer and their pleas, and maintain their cause and forgive your people who have sinned against you.

cnv.text: 求你從天上，從你的居所垂聽他們的禱告祈求，為他們伸冤，赦免得罪了你的那些子民。

ccb.text: 求你从你天上的居所垂听他们的祈求，为他们伸张正义，赦免得罪你的子民。
